{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603230206150FBE7DF8A7E08C05C23B"}"},"total":7},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7546952105249096473","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"嗯，感觉偏向于网状叙事,作者很有潜力呢!内容不失搞笑，就是有些地方有点不合理,在前几章的时候讲到主办方邀请克苏鲁进副本我感觉很不合理是因为克苏鲁实力太强，如果控制不住的话就容易翻车，但是后来发现是信徒啊那没事了,也有很多讽刺现实的内容,很好看，还得继续写下去啊！不要放弃读者的羁绊啊! 混蛋!!!","text_exts":[{"e":56,"s":53,"text":"克苏鲁","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E5%85%8B%E8%8B%8F%E9%B2%81&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%2317742027758C05C23B%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227546952105249096473%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227503114163674156094%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E5%85%8B%E8%8B%8F%E9%B2%81%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1757162826,"group_id":"7503114163674156094","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"你们一个个的都抽象的没边","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N8zEm6aQLIlHAusEAEePi/A=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/4e471e8b4f464086921590d380d962c0~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776790327&x-signature=4bcv0a%2BnnCEnKWRyVE2UELbhgP8%3D","user_id":"153548086313923","user_name":"AAA「光锥」批发商"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"153548086313923","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7503114163674156094","book_info":{"abstract":"【轻松，应该不恐怖，无敌文（能爆宇宙那种）】
如题，主角不是人，而是克苏鲁.弗坦，行走大地的人或多或少都听过祂的名讳，祂有着章鱼一样的头，类人的身体，蝙蝠一样的畸形翅膀。
祂是超乎一切物质，超乎一切时间，超乎一切空间的存在
祂是混沌的具象，是未知的起点，同时存在于过去现在未来。
祂闭上了眼，然后，万物归一。
……
南太平洋海底，拉莱耶之城，顶着章鱼头的克总坐在马桶上，“真tm邪门，可恶的人类，又来偷到吾的厕所来了！”
已经宅家不知多少纪元的克总，某天收到了诡异副本的邀请，闲来无事，不管是旧日支配者的阴谋，还是外神的博弈，都无关系，故事就这样开始了……","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2ofb2cbbcdde85086ff95adec9f8f7e1be~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"枫与约定","author_id":"","book_id":"7503114163674156094","book_name":"诡异副本：不过主角是克苏鲁","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#103840","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":539,"name":"悬疑脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=539&name=悬疑脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":10,"name":"悬疑","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=10&name=悬疑&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":705,"name":"克苏鲁","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=705&name=克苏鲁&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":864,"name":"副本","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=864&name=副本&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":384,"name":"无敌","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=384&name=无敌&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7503114401361166910","read_count":"222","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"233356"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"115","tags":"悬疑脑洞,悬疑,克苏鲁,副本,无敌","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2ofb2cbbcdde85086ff95adec9f8f7e1be~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779386775&x-signature=JHEjAvNTrIHioJEbjMjKXTaRI54%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3274797640586494","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"58"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603230206150FBE7DF8A7E08C05C23B"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"8","score_suffix_text":"阅读6小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":14,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":11430,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":21235,"r
